title: Tyler Technologies Signs First Full-Suite Public Safety Agency in State of Maine
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has signed an agreement with Scarborough Public Safety in Maine for Tyler's public safety solutions.

title: Why Is Tyler Technologies (TYL) Down 2.2% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Tyler Technologies (TYL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Tyler Technologies to Participate in September Investor Conferences
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies will participate in three investor conferences in September 2023.

title: 4 Business-Software Services Stocks to Watch in a Prospering Industry
text: The Zacks Business-Software Services industry players like MSCI, TYL, GWRE and PLUS are poised to benefit from the robust demand trend for multi-cloud-enabled software solutions.

title: Some Good Tech Stocks Are Inexpensive. This ETF Proves as Much
text: Tech and communication services rank as two of the best-performing sectors since the start of the year. So it's reasonable to expect some advisors and investors to ponder frothy valuations in those high-flying sectors.

title: Tyler (TYL) Completes Computing System Innovations Buyout
text: Tyler (TYL) acquires Computing System Innovations to advance its electronic filing and redaction solutions portfolio.

title: Tyler Technologies Acquires Computing System Innovations
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced it has acquired Computing System Innovations, LLC (CSI).

title: Tyler (TYL) Offers Student Transportation Solution to Frisco ISD
text: Tyler's (TYL) Student Transportation solution is selected by Frisco Independent School District to advance routing efficiency and planning.

title: Frisco Independent School District Selects Tyler Technologies' Student Transportation Solution
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has signed an agreement with Frisco Independent School District in Texas for Tyler's Student Transportation solution.
